columns.description:
The current status of a product:
Active: Product is in volume production
Evaluation: Product is under characterization. Limited Engineering samples available
Preview: Product is in design stage
Target: Product is in design feasibility stage.No commitment taken to produce
Proposal: Marketing proposal for customer feedback.No commitment taken to design or produce
NRND: Not Recommended for New Design.Product is in volume production only to support customers ongoing production.
columns.name: Marketing Status

columns.description: Compliancy of the device with industry requirement domains (IRD)
columns.name: Grade

columns.description: Marketing description of the package type.
columns.name: Package

columns.description: Static Drain to Source on State Resistance.
columns.name: R<sub>DS(on)</sub>

columns.description: The dc current values that the device is able to manage
columns.name: Drain Current (Dc)

columns.description: The total power dissipation (Typ, Max) usually at specified ambient or case temperature.
columns.name: P<sub>TOT</sub>

columns.description: Time taken for the reverse current to reach  the specified level when the reverse voltage is applied while the device is conducting in the forward direction. (trr)
columns.name: Reverse Recovery Time

columns.description: Peak current value when the specified reverse voltage is applied. (IRRM)
columns.name: Peak Reverse Current

levelTitle: STPOWER N-channel MOSFETs > 200 V to 700 V
